name: Fab
description: Floating action button. Single fixed sizing rung, pill geometry, floating elevation. No disabled state.

label.note: Provide as children. At least one of icon/label required.

icon.description: 24px (sys.icon.lg) glyph naming the action. Optional but at least one of icon/label required.

label.description: Short verb phrase. When present, padded internally so glyph never crowds the pill ends.

focusIndicator.description: Keyboard-focus visual — an accessibility indicator, not a lifecycle state. Composes over whichever lifecycle state the FAB is in. The ring stacks above the FAB's floating elevation so the lift survives focus. The `states.focused` block above is kept for JSX runtime consumers; this block is the parallel external-reader contract.
focusIndicator.compositionReason: Action affordance with breathing room around it; the 3px outward extent is reserved by the surrounding layout.
focusIndicator.trigger: :focus-visible (keyboard / programmatic focus, never plain mouse click)

forbidden: more than one fab per screen — the FAB is the single canonical commit
fab styled with sys.color.primary fill — the FAB carries sys.color.brand by anatomy contract
destructive flavor on a FAB — destructive commits live inside Dialog / BottomSheet, never a floating commit
fab placed inline in flow — it floats over content, anchored bottom-right by the page shell
